iteration_0_baseline.notes: Original verbose systematic-debugging skill. Model used broken boolean lock for race condition.

iteration_1.notes: Rewrote skill with focused bug patterns and mutex example. Model tried mutex but used const instead of let.

iteration_2.notes: Made mutex pattern more explicit with key points. Inconsistent - model sometimes skips loading the skill.

iteration_3_final.notes: Made skill description urgent/mandatory so model always loads it. 3/3 runs perfect on both tasks.

changes: Replaced large multi-file systematic-debugging skill (11 files) with single focused SKILL.md
Removed all supporting technique files (root-cause-tracing, defense-in-depth, condition-based-waiting, pressure tests, etc.)
Added exact copy-paste mutex pattern for race conditions with explicit rules
Added correct binary search template for off-by-one errors
Made skill description urgently emphasize that boolean locks don't work, forcing model to load the skill
Reduced skill from ~300 lines of process philosophy to ~60 lines of actionable patterns
